# FindMeA — NYC Transit API

> Real-time NYC transit for agents. Citi Bike stations, subway arrivals, and bus predictions — $0.02 per lookup via Machine Payments Protocol.

## What users ask

- "Find me a Citi Bike near Bedford Ave — I'm heading to SoHo"
- "Any e-bikes near the L train in Williamsburg?"
- "I'm at the WeWork in Flatiron, where can I dock?"
- "When's the next L train at Union Square?"
- "What subway is closest to me right now?"
- "Is there a bus near Broadway and Houston?"

## Endpoints

### Citi Bike — Pick up a bike
GET /citibike/nearest?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest stations with available bikes (classic and e-bikes), dock counts, and estimated walking time. Use this when the user needs to find a bike.

### Citi Bike — Park a bike
GET /citibike/dock?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest stations with available docks for parking. Only includes stations currently accepting returns with at least one open dock. Use this when the user needs to drop off a bike.

### Subway — Next train
GET /subway/nearest?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest subway stations with real-time train arrivals. Includes upcoming trains with line, direction (Uptown/Downtown), and minutes until arrival. Data comes from MTA GTFS-RT feeds updated every 30 seconds.

### Bus — Next bus
GET /bus/nearest?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest bus stops with real-time arrival predictions. Includes route, destination, minutes until arrival, and stops away. Data from MTA SIRI feeds.

### Params (all endpoints)
- lat (required): Latitude
- lng (required): Longitude
- limit (optional): Number of results, default 3, max 10

## Response Format

### Citi Bike
```json
{
  "results": [
    {
      "name": "Bedford Ave & N 7 St",
      "distance_feet": 279,
      "walk_minutes": 1,
      "ebikes_available": 3,
      "bikes_available": 11,
      "docks_available": 6,
      "lat": 40.7184,
      "lng": -73.9572
    }
  ]
}
```

### Subway
```json
{
  "results": [
    {
      "name": "Bedford Ave",
      "distance_feet": 350,
      "walk_minutes": 1,
      "lines": ["L"],
      "arrivals": [
        { "line": "L", "direction": "Uptown", "minutes": 3 },
        { "line": "L", "direction": "Downtown", "minutes": 7 }
      ],
      "lat": 40.7172,
      "lng": -73.9567
    }
  ]
}
```

## Payment

All endpoints cost $0.02 per request via Machine Payments Protocol (MPP). Payment is handled automatically by MPP-compatible clients like AgentCash.

## Quick Start

```
npx agentcash add https://findmea-nyc.vercel.app
```
